tableRow.maxContractTerm: 5 years (default). Longer term permitted only if the governing board determines in writing, before the procurement solicitation is issued, that a contract of longer duration would be advantageous. All multiyear payment obligations subject to annual appropriation.
tableRow.rebidRequired: Conditional. At expiration a new competitive procurement must be conducted under the School District Procurement Rules. Narrow exceptions for sole source (R7-2-1053), emergency procurement (R7-2-1055), and cooperative/piggyback purchases (A.R.S. 15-213(B), (Q)(3)).
tableRow.renewalMechanics: Renewal/extension permitted without re-solicitation only if (i) the contract duration and the conditions of renewal/extension are stated up front in the IFB/RFP, and (ii) monies are available for the first fiscal period at execution. Board must make written determination that requirements are reasonable and continuing and that a multiterm contract is advantageous. Non-appropriation cancellation clause required. The 5-year cap (with written-board-determination override) applies to aggregate term including disclosed renewals.
tableRow.districtVariance: Unknown. No AG opinion, Auditor General report, ADE bulletin, or ASBA guidance located documenting a substantive interpretive split.
